title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 64.205 - Applicability of sections 64.170 to 64.200 (first and second class counties)
text:
64.205.  Applicability of sections 64.170 to 64.200 (first and second class counties). — Sections 64.170 to 64.200 shall apply to all counties of the first and second class.
(L. 1963 p. 117)
